mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sal_order ( id, bill_no, bill_date, customer_id, customer_name, price_level, warehouse_id, salesman_id, salesman_name, order_type, pay_type, currency, exchange_rate, total_qty, total_amount, discount_rate, discount_amount, tail_amount, tax_amount, total_amount_tax, received_amount, delivery_date, address, phone, bill_status, source_bill_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{billNo}, #{billDate}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{priceLevel}, #{warehouseId}, #{salesmanId}, #{salesmanName}, #{orderType}, #{payType}, #{currency}, #{exchangeRate}, #{totalQty}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountRate}, #{discountAmount}, #{tailAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmountTax}, #{receivedAmount}, #{deliveryDate}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{billStatus}, #{sourceBillId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sal_order SET bill_no = #{et.billNo}, bill_date = #{et.billDate}, customer_id = #{et.customerId}, customer_name = #{et.customerName}, price_level = #{et.priceLevel}, warehouse_id = #{et.warehouseId}, salesman_id = #{et.salesmanId}, salesman_name = #{et.salesmanName}, order_type = #{et.orderType}, pay_type = #{et.payType}, currency = #{et.currency}, exchange_rate = #{et.exchangeRate}, total_qty = #{et.totalQty}, total_amount = #{et.totalAmount}, discount_rate = #{et.discountRate}, discount_amount = #{et.discountAmount}, tail_amount = #{et.tailAmount}, tax_amount = #{et.taxAmount}, total_amount_tax = #{et.totalAmountTax}, received_amount = #{et.receivedAmount}, delivery_date = #{et.deliveryDate}, address = #{et.address}, phone = #{et.phone}, bill_status = #{et.billStatus}, source_bill_id = #{et.sourceBillId}, remark = #{et.remark}, update_by = #{et.updateBy}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} WHERE id = #{et.id}
